mapper.select: select id, policy_scope, image_connection_id, scanned_pdf_connection_id, cleanup_enabled, cleanup_model_profile_id, fallback_policy_json::text as fallback_policy_json, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at from document_parse_route_policies where policy_scope = #{policyScope}
mapper.insert: insert into document_parse_route_policies ( policy_scope, image_connection_id, scanned_pdf_connection_id, cleanup_enabled, cleanup_model_profile_id, fallback_policy_json, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{policy.policyScope}, #{policy.imageConnectionId}, #{policy.scannedPdfConnectionId}, #{policy.cleanupEnabled}, #{policy.cleanupModelProfileId}, #{policy.fallbackPolicyJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{policy.createdBy}, #{policy.updatedBy} )
mapper.update: update document_parse_route_policies set image_connection_id = #{policy.imageConnectionId}, scanned_pdf_connection_id = #{policy.scannedPdfConnectionId}, cleanup_enabled = #{policy.cleanupEnabled}, cleanup_model_profile_id = #{policy.cleanupModelProfileId}, fallback_policy_json = #{policy.fallbackPolicyJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, updated_by = #{policy.updatedBy}, updated_at = current_timestamp where policy_scope = #{policy.policyScope}
